title: Light-mode byte-stability check in CI
oneline: Committed sha256 manifest + CI drift check validated in both directions
summary: Chose the manifest variant over a commit-message-scoped check (repo has the exact img:audit/img:audit:check precedent and no commit-message convention). Implemented tools/asset-gen/gen-asset-manifest.mjs with gen:assets:manifest / check:assets:manifest npm scripts (ADR-0019) hashing 682 committed art assets (shipped coloring pages, style covers, fill-src raws), plus a Quality-job CI step. Validated: manifest regeneration is byte-deterministic; a sharp re-encode of one *.light.webp is caught as exactly that file (exit 1); a legitimate night change localizes to one night hash line with zero light-side lines in the diff. Patch applies cleanly to baseline; repo left pristine.
tried: Evaluated commit-message-scoped CI check vs committed manifest against repo conventions (test.yml, ADR-0019, img:audit precedent)
Implemented gen-asset-manifest.mjs (sha256sum-compatible manifest, --check verifier) inside tools/asset-gen/
Wired gen:assets:manifest + check:assets:manifest npm scripts with scripts-info entries and a Quality-job CI step
Simulated accidental light re-encode during a night pass (sharp round-trip of farm/dog-wide.light.webp)
Simulated legitimate night regen (farm/dog-wide.night.webp) and inspected manifest diff localization
Tested ADDED/REMOVED detection with a stray and a deleted asset
eslint + prettier + npm-run wiring + YAML parse verification; git apply --check of the patch on the pristine tree
worked: Manifest generation is deterministic (byte-identical across runs)
check catches an accidental light-byte change as exactly the one touched file, exit 1
Legit night change shows as a single night hash line; 0 light/outline/thumb lines change
ADDED and REMOVED assets are also detected
Whole check hashes 682 assets in ~1-2s offline — cheap enough for every PR, no asset-PR filtering needed
limitations: Enforces manifest freshness, not night-only intent: after a regen the reviewer must still spot a light hash line in the PR diff (the check makes that line exist; it does not judge it)
Every legitimate asset change now needs `npm run gen:assets:manifest` before commit (CI message says so)
Scoped to *.webp in the three art trees; prerelease and pipeline.md runbook integration left as follow-ups

code.title: Full implementation: script + manifest + package.json scripts/scripts-info + CI step
